CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LUIS PEREZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 AT 3:30PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, CRYSTAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, DIANA PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LUIS PEREZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT -
